description: Gather intelligence from registered collector agents deployed on Kubernetes clusters and VMs. All operations are read-only by policy.

tools.name: list_collectors
tools.description: List all registered collector agents and their online/offline status.
tools.returns: JSON list of collectors with name, URL, status, cluster, node, and capabilities.
tools.whenToUse: Use first to discover which collectors are available before running scripts.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the target collector is already known.

tools.name: list_builtin_scripts
tools.description: List built-in read-only scripts available on a collector agent.

parameters.name: collector_name
parameters.description: Name of the collector to query. Defaults to the first available collector.

tools.returns: JSON list of built-in scripts and collector capabilities.
tools.whenToUse: Use to discover what ready-made collection scripts are available.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when you already know the script name.

tools.name: gather_info
tools.description: Run a read-only bash or python script on a collector agent to gather system/cluster information.

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: Bash or Python script to execute. Must be read-only.

parameters.name: collector_name
parameters.description: Target collector name. Defaults to the first available collector.

tools.whenToUse: Use to collect configuration, status, metrics, or diagnostic data from a remote cluster or VM.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for write, delete, or mutation operations. Do not use when COLLECTOR_ENDPOINTS is not configured.

tools.name: get_system_info
tools.description: Get system information from a specific collector agent.

parameters.name: collector_name
parameters.description: Name of the collector to query. Defaults to the first available collector.

tools.returns: System info JSON from the collector.
tools.whenToUse: Use to quickly inspect OS, node, or cluster metadata.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when you need custom queries; prefer gather_info.

tools.name: fan_out_collect
tools.description: Run a built-in script on all registered collectors in parallel.

parameters.name: script_name
parameters.description: Name of a built-in script to run on every collector.

tools.whenToUse: Use when you need the same read-only diagnostic across multiple clusters or nodes at once.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for custom scripts; use gather_info for one-off scripts.
